meaning: adj.裸体的,裸的,与生俱有的,无装饰的n.裸体画,裸体
examples: She refused to be photographed nude.
She refuses to be photographed in the nude.
I don't accept that it's merely a nude.
She then turned a full 180 degrees and developed an obsession with simple nude nails.
Some lawmakers want to come up with ways to prevent harassment via nude photo posting.
